mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (session_id, user_id, session_name, conversation_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{sessionName}, #{conversationId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
